title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Container Corporation of India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Container Corporation of India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Distribution Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
